products.hook: Arre baap re! Ye price glitch hai ya kya? 😱 Itna sasta portable fan? Pagal ho gaye hain kya Amazon wale?
products.pain: Garmi mein hostel mein AC nahi hai, aur ceiling fan bhi kabir singh ki tarah slow chalta hai? Exam ke time pasina pochte pochte dimaag kharab ho jata hai!
products.fix: Ye chhota sa powerhouse fan tere desk pe ya bed side table pe rakh. Rechargeable hai, toh power cut mein bhi kaam aayega. Pocket mein ghus jaata hai, library mein bhi le jaa! Mast hawa dega, tension khatam! It's a lifesaver, trust me!
products.loot_reason: Iski MRP ₹550 hai, par abhi ₹149 mein mil raha hai, seedha 72% off! Aisi deal phir nahi milegi.
